header.title: Rotate PDF — Rotate Pages 90, 180, 270 Degrees Online
header.description: Free online PDF rotator to rotate pages by 90, 180, or 270 degrees. Rotate all pages at once or select specific pages individually. Fix scanned PDF orientation and save permanently — 100% client-side, files never uploaded.
header.keywords: rotate pdf, pdf page rotator, rotate pdf pages, pdf rotation tool, rotate pdf 90 degrees, fix pdf orientation, pdf page orientation, free pdf rotator

privacy.notice: 100% client-side. Your PDF is processed entirely in the browser — nothing is uploaded to any server.

howToUse.title: How to Use Rotate PDF
howToUse.step1Desc: Drop or upload the PDF file whose pages you want to rotate.
howToUse.step2Desc: Click individual pages to rotate them, or use bulk rotate options for all, even, or odd pages.
howToUse.step3Desc: Check the pending changes panel to see which pages are modified before applying.
howToUse.step4Desc: Click 'Apply Rotations & Download' to save your rotated PDF — all processing is client-side.

items.question: What rotation angles are supported?
items.answer: 90° clockwise, 90° counter-clockwise, and 180° rotation are all supported.

items.question: Can I rotate multiple pages at once?
items.answer: Yes. Use bulk rotate to apply rotation to all pages, or select specific pages and rotate them together.

items.question: Can I rotate even and odd pages differently?
items.answer: Yes. The bulk rotate panel has options to rotate even pages or odd pages by 90° CW or 90° CCW independently.

items.question: Does rotation permanently modify the PDF?
items.answer: The downloaded PDF will have the rotation applied permanently. The page content is physically rotated in the file.

items.question: What is the maximum PDF size?
items.answer: Files up to 100 MB typically work well. Very large files may be limited by browser memory.

items.question: Is my PDF uploaded to a server?
items.answer: No. All rotation is done locally in your browser using pdf-lib. Your file never leaves your device.
